name: Dependency Vulnerability Check
description: Scan project dependency manifests for known CVEs and security advisories. Checks package.json, requirements.txt, go.mod, Cargo.toml, and other package files.

parameters.name: manifestPath
parameters.description: Path to the dependency manifest file (package.json, requirements.txt, etc.)

parameters.name: includeDev
parameters.description: Include development dependencies in the check

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Minimum severity threshold for reported vulnerabilities

outputDescription: Array of vulnerable dependencies: {package, installedVersion, vulnerableRange, severity, cve, advisory, fixedVersion, isDirect}. Empty array if no vulnerabilities found.
author: openspace
